title: Weak Authentication Mechanism
description: The system lacks detailed information regarding authentication and authorization mechanisms. This allows an attacker to potentially bypass authentication controls, impersonate legitimate users, or gain unauthorized access to the system.  Without multi-factor authentication or robust password policies, the system is vulnerable to credential stuffing and brute-force attacks.
attack_vector: Exploiting vulnerabilities in the authentication logic, weak password policies, or lack of rate limiting.
mitigations: Implement Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for all users.
Enforce strong password policies (minimum length, complexity, regular rotation).
Implement rate limiting on login attempts to mitigate brute-force attacks.
